mapper.insert: INSERT INTO admin_change_snapshots (entity_type, entity_id, before_data, after_data, checksum, created_at, created_by) VALUES (#{entityType}, #{entityId}, #{beforeData}::jsonb, #{afterData}::jsonb, #{checksum}, NOW(), #{createdBy})
mapper.select: SELECT id, entity_type AS entityType, entity_id AS entityId, before_data::text AS beforeData, after_data::text AS afterData, checksum, created_at AS createdAt, created_by AS createdBy FROM admin_change_snapshots WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT s.id, s.entity_type AS entityType, s.entity_id AS entityId, s.before_data::text AS beforeData, s.after_data::text AS afterData, s.checksum, s.created_at AS createdAt, s.created_by AS createdBy FROM admin_change_snapshots s JOIN admin_change_records r ON r.id = #{recordId} WHERE s.id = ANY(STRING_TO_ARRAY(r.snapshot_ids, ',')::bigint[]) ORDER BY s.id
mapper.update: UPDATE admin_change_snapshots SET after_data = #{afterData}::jsonb WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO admin_change_records (entity_type, entity_id, change_set, snapshot_ids, operator_id, operator_name, risk, reason, status, created_at) VALUES (#{entityType}, #{entityId}, #{changeSet}::jsonb, #{snapshotIds}, #{operatorId}, #{operatorName}, #{risk}, #{reason}, 'pending', NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT id, entity_type AS entityType, entity_id AS entityId, change_set::text AS changeSet, snapshot_ids AS snapshotIds, operator_id AS operatorId, operator_name AS operatorName, risk, reason, status, created_at AS createdAt, committed_at AS committedAt, rolled_back_at AS rolledBackAt, rollback_record_id AS rollbackRecordId, error_message AS errorMessage FROM admin_change_records WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, entity_type AS entityType, entity_id AS entityId, change_set::text AS changeSet, snapshot_ids AS snapshotIds, operator_id AS operatorId, operator_name AS operatorName, risk, reason, status, created_at AS createdAt, committed_at AS committedAt, rolled_back_at AS rolledBackAt, rollback_record_id AS rollbackRecordId, error_message AS errorMessage FROM admin_change_records WHERE entity_type = #{entityType} AND entity_id = #{entityId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
